heroValueZh: 使用 AI Agent，把需求快速变成可交付产品
heroValueEn: Use AI agents to turn requirements into shippable products
heroSubZh: 打造团队高效工作流，聚焦 Agent 执行链设计、Prompt 优化与通用 LLM Skill 封装，支持从原型到上线交付。
heroSubEn: Focused on agent workflow design, prompt optimization, and reusable LLM skills from prototype to production.

capabilities.titleZh: Agent 开发与执行链设计
capabilities.summaryZh: 了解并实践 LangChain、LlamaIndex、AutoGen 等框架，面向业务场景设计可执行 Agent 链路。
capabilities.summaryEn: Hands-on with LangChain, LlamaIndex, and AutoGen to design executable agent workflows for business scenarios.

capabilities.summaryZh: 熟悉 Prompt Engineering、Chain of Thought、ReAct 等方法，持续优化模型响应质量与稳定性。
capabilities.summaryEn: Apply Prompt Engineering, Chain of Thought, and ReAct to improve response quality and reliability.

capabilities.titleZh: 通用 LLM Skill 封装与复用
capabilities.summaryZh: 封装文本生成、SQL 辅助、数据分析等通用能力，支持平台级复用与快速扩展。
capabilities.summaryEn: Package reusable skills such as text generation, SQL assistance, and data analysis for scalable platform reuse.

solutions.demandZh: 多步骤业务任务自动化
solutions.approachZh: 基于 LangChain/LlamaIndex 设计 Agent 执行链，接入工具与知识源形成可追踪流程
solutions.approachEn: Design agent execution chains with LangChain/LlamaIndex and connect tools and knowledge sources
solutions.resultZh: 实现任务自动执行与关键环节可观测，降低人工切换成本
solutions.resultEn: Enable automated execution with better observability and lower manual overhead

solutions.demandZh: 模型响应质量与稳定性提升
solutions.approachZh: 持续优化 Prompt，结合 Chain of Thought 与 ReAct 策略并建立评测回归
solutions.approachEn: Continuously optimize prompts with CoT and ReAct strategies plus evaluation regression
solutions.resultZh: 提升响应一致性与可解释性，减少线上波动
solutions.resultEn: Improve consistency and explainability while reducing production volatility

solutions.demandZh: 平台能力复用与快速扩展
solutions.demandEn: Reusable platform capabilities and rapid expansion
solutions.approachZh: 封装通用 LLM Skill（文本生成、SQL 辅助、数据分析），并具备 OpenClaw 搭建与接入经验
solutions.approachEn: Package reusable LLM skills and leverage OpenClaw setup/integration experience when needed
solutions.resultZh: 缩短新场景接入周期，提升团队复用效率
solutions.resultEn: Shorten onboarding time for new scenarios and improve team reuse efficiency

solutions.demandZh: 内容生产与营销素材自动化
solutions.demandEn: Automated content and marketing asset production
solutions.approachZh: 基于 COZE 工作流编排内容任务，自动生成短视频脚本、宣传图与发布素材，串联审核与分发流程
solutions.approachEn: Use COZE workflows to generate video scripts, promo creatives, and publishing assets with review and distribution steps
solutions.resultZh: 缩短内容制作周期，提升营销产出效率与团队协同速度
solutions.resultEn: Shorten content cycles and improve marketing throughput with better team coordination

cta.titleZh: 打造AI工作流，agent垂直开发，优化团队效率，我们可以聊聊
cta.titleEn: If you need to turn AI ideas into shipped products, let's connect
cta.subZh: 支持项目协作、技术方案评估与工程落地实施。
cta.subEn: Available for solution consulting and production delivery.
